series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence between state-chartered banks and the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions regarding the examination process and requirements of the Division, including all material related to this correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility twenty (20) years date of examination and ; Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files twenty (20) years date of examination and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
